TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_balu_nu_uciya_a_tatayna, title = balu_nu_uciya_a_tatayna, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/balu_nu_uciya_a_tatayna} }

S.FORM: balu nu ucya a tatayna (kamu nu Hulam: ŤĆ∂ŤäĪŚ•≥) kamu nu cudad a sasakamuen nu pakuyucay a inaka nu limucedan ci Ma-ke-li-te' tayni i Fa-kuo Pa-li malingatu tu pacupiyaw, tada bangcal tu cinida kanamuhan nu Pa-li siidaay a luma'an masasu namuh namin, mala sakanamuhan a pacupiyaway, pangangan han "balu nu ucya a tatayna", uipitupida' cinidaan kanca idaw ku kanamuhan nida tu cacaya a balud nu balu- u ucya a baluan. ci Ma-ke-li-te' si haykikac a imelangan, itida i kuncun padekuan malitemuh nida ku siidaay a limucedan, u udip nida atu taykaku mahida ci Ma-ke-li-te' , saka daysankic tu sisa caay ka tenes mapatay tu, siidaay nu limuceda a wama ci Muo-li A-lung kun-cea mabahal makaadih tu misengiay tu tataynaan a wawa numaku ci Ma-ke-li-te' , sa alahan cinida palawawa han. ci kun-cea mihang ci Ma-ke-li-te' an tu hamin nu sakaudip nida, anu males nida ku sapacupiyaw a kawaw. nika ci Ma-ke-li-te' ahican ahican nida kiya haw, ci kun-cea pangkiw kunipi wada nida tu sapabeli cinidaan tu sakaudip , ci Ma-ke-li-te' caay pakadungdung tunipiwada nida tu hatidaay a sakaudip, yadah tu ku tadah nida anu pina tu a mang nu Fa-lan . . idaw ku cacaya a labii nu kalaluwahan a demiad, biyaw nida ci Puo-li-dan-se idaw kunipi laday nida tu tusaay a masakapahay idaw ku cacay ci A-mang Tu-wa mapatay nungalay ci Ma-ke-li-te' an. mudeku ci Ma-ke-li-te' tu cacaya a mihcaan, ci A-mang sademiad sa tayni mididaw tu imelang nida, caay pahetik tu ngangan nida. ci Puo-li-dan-se pasayda musakamu ci Ma-ke-li-te' ci A-mang anga tu ngalay nida, talalusa' cinida malalum. idaw ku cacaya a demiad, namukan sa henay ci Ma-ke-li-te' alaw kasenu' sa pihaceng ku adada nida, ci A-mang paayaw cinidaan amanan pi'dis tu udip numisa han, sakamu han nida tu ngalay cinidaan, tulu tu amihcaan ku ngalay aku i tisuwan han. naw samuhmuh sananay ci Ma-ke-li-te' maka tengil tu kamu nida mahicaay kiya ku namaka balucuay nida a namuh, pabeli hannida ci A-mang tu cacaya a balu nu uciaan, saka paini tu kasasunamuh. tatengaay tu ni A-mang a masasungalay, mabawbaw ku balucu ni Ma-ke-li-te' tu sakaudip nu tawyaay, pabalucu satu cinida miales tu i Pa-li ani pacupiyawan a sakaudip, tayda nuheni atu ci A-mang i inaka maudip. idaw kunipi kiyakuna nuda tu kalisiwan, waniken nida ci A-mang . tahekal sahenay ci A-mang malitemuh nida ku naayaway ni Ma-ke-li-te' a mamidang, mapaaw cinida pabaliw. malinges cinida sulit satu tigamin sapabeli ci Ma-ke-li-te' an, sakamusa kaikaku mala katawaan nutau a mamidang sa, liyas satu cinida tu Pa-li . suayaw satu ci A-mang cinidaan, ci Ma-ke-li-te' u kaydihan numaku atu sakaudip, sisa, caay piliyas cinida tu Pa-li , patusud cinida tu kanglayan nida a tademaw sululen kaku sa, ci Ma-ke-li-te' paini ci A-mang nan sakamusa, " isuhan uni ka anuiwiwan numaku amaudip u sakasingalihan numaku kisu a tademaw". pina tu a demiadan, ina tatusaan itida i liklik nu Pa-li ami'esuy tu luma'. katinengan satu ni kun-cea , putun hantu ku sapabeli ci Ma-ke-li-te' an tu sakaudip a kalisiw. sudikuden nida ku mamidang nida pacakay tu nu udip a udu kim, sakacaw atu sakaudip nu sakaudip nuheni. ci A-mang matineng satu, mangalay pacakay tunipabeli nu babalaki cinidan tu zaysang, mihamin patadah tu tadah nu mamidang nida. ci A-mang maalaan nida ku cenci tademaw patayida i Pa-li misulit tunipataynian tu tigamim, ci A-mang liyasen hannida ku mamidanga nida. ya tigamin alaw niyama ni A-mang , Suywu' skakaay ci Du' ‚Äďwa sinsen nisulitan, pacebaen nida ci A-mang miliyas, sisa mitepanida ci Ma-ke-li-te' , sakumu han nida "tataynaan a wawa nu kaku, ci A-mang a calekakaan nu tatayna atu siidaay a luma' nu kunce amikunyaku, sisa yaluma' makatengil tu ci A-mang ngan atu ci Ma-ke-li-te' nu kankiy sakamu sa: anu ci A-mang anu caay kales kuni kalecabayan tina pacupiyaway, asipacubelis kunipi kunyaku sa. ci Ma-ke-li-te' mangutebul miyukiw ci Du' ‚Äďwa sinsen : anu putunen han nunamu kuni kalecaayan mihida mipataya kumu i takuwan. ci Du' ‚Äďwa sinsen caay pisudang, ci Ma-ke-li-te' mipili' cinida, sakamu han nida ci Du' ‚Äďwa sinsen mihang tu kaku atu ci A-mang acaaytu kalecabay kami han. ci Ma-ke-li-te' mapatay nu lalum misulit tu sapabeli tu sakaputun anikalecabayan a tigamin, taluma'satu i Pa-li mutikuaca mala pacupiyawan cinida. midawis cinida tu ngalay ni Wae-wile-nacea , Nacea padangan nida mibues tu hamin nu tadah, mapatadah satu patalumaen nida ku udu' kim atu sakacaw . maala ni A-mang ku tigamin mapatay nu lalum kilul satu tu wama a taluma' i niyadu, nika ci A-mang yadah kunidatengan tuci Ma-ke-li-te' an, cinida caay tu kawnu tademawan taynisaca i Pa-li . cinida mangalay mi'dis pacuay tu mamidang a "tunipibelihan cinidaan " matepa nida ku balu nu uciya a tatayna, misanai cinidaan, kaynahen nida tu naian nu wantan han, naian nu balucuan a pacupiyawan han, u kasasunamuh han palasiwbayan numis han. ci Ma-ke-li-te' misuayaw tu mamidanga nu patelac, malalum cinida pawanen kaku han, acaay tu kasasuadih kita. ci A-mang mangalay atu cinida miliyas tina Pa-li an, milaliw taydan i caaya kaw katinengay nutaw a kitidaan, tayda itida unika sasungaayan nuheni. ci Ma-ke-li-te' namusakamu tu cinidaan, acaay hidai kina kawaw sa, ci A-mang patelac kuni simsiman satu uyniyan atu ci Nacea nu sakakapah nuheni sa, mapatay nu linges cuduh han nida ci Ma-ke-li-te' , nu cacaya a tepik nu pida sipatepi' han i udip nida misanai cinidaan, liyut satu cinida miliyas. mapacucuk ku balucu ni Ma-ke-li-te' , mabulilah. utiih satu ku udipudipan, imelang caay tu lekal. ci A-mang yadatu miliyas tu Fa-kuo . namakayiniay a nasulitan
S.PHON: bar~…ĺu nu u ¶ja a tatajna (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ***) kamu nu ¶udad a sasakamu…ôn nu pakuju ¶aj a inaka nu r~…ĺimu ¶…ôdan ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° tajni i fa-kuo pa-r~…ĺi mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu pa ¶upijaw, tada baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ tu ¶inida kanamuńßan nu pa-r~…ĺi siidaaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an masasu namuńß namin, mar~…ĺa sakanamuńßan a pa ¶upijawaj, paŇčaŇčan ńßan "bar~…ĺu nu u ¶ja a tatajna", uipitupida Ē~ ° ¶inidaan kan ¶a idaw ku kanamuńßan nida tu ¶a ¶aja a bar~…ĺud nu bar~…ĺu- u u ¶ja a bar~…ĺuan. ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° si ńßajkika ¶ a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan, itida i kun ¶un pad…ôkuan mar~…ĺit…ômuńß nida ku siidaaj a r~…ĺimu ¶…ôdan, u udip nida atu tajkaku mańßida ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° , saka dajsanki ¶ tu sisa ¶aaj ka t…ôn…ôs mapataj tu, siidaaj nu r~…ĺimu ¶…ôda a wama ¶i muo-r~…ĺi a-r~…ĺuŇč kun- ¶…ôa mabańßar~…ĺ makaadińß tu mis…ôŇčiaj tu tatajnaan a wawa numaku ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° , sa ar~…ĺańßan ¶inida par~…ĺawawa ńßan. ¶i kun- ¶…ôa mińßaŇč ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° an tu ńßamin nu sakaudip nida, anu mar~…ĺ…ôs nida ku sapa ¶upijaw a kawaw. nika ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° ańßi ¶an ańßi ¶an nida kija ńßaw, ¶i kun- ¶…ôa paŇčkiw kunipi wada nida tu sapab…ôr~…ĺi ¶inidaan tu sakaudip , ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° ¶aaj pakaduŇčduŇč tunipiwada nida tu ńßatidaaj a sakaudip, jadańß tu ku tadańß nida anu pina tu a maŇč nu fa-r~…ĺan . . idaw ku ¶a ¶aja a r~…ĺabii nu kar~…ĺar~…ĺuwańßan a d…ômiad, bijaw nida ¶i puo-r~…ĺi-dan-s…ô idaw kunipi r~…ĺadaj nida tu tusaaj a masakapańßaj idaw ku ¶a ¶aj ¶i a-maŇč tu-wa mapataj nuŇčar~…ĺaj ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° an. mud…ôku ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° tu ¶a ¶aja a mińß ¶aan, ¶i a-maŇč sad…ômiad sa tajni mididaw tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč nida, ¶aaj pańß…ôtik tu ŇčaŇčan nida. ¶i puo-r~…ĺi-dan-s…ô pasajda musakamu ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° ¶i a-maŇč aŇča tu Ňčar~…ĺaj nida, tar~…ĺar~…ĺusa Ē~ ° ¶inida mar~…ĺar~…ĺum. idaw ku ¶a ¶aja a d…ômiad, namukan sa ńß…ônaj ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° ar~…ĺaw kas…ônu Ē~ ° sa pińßa ¶…ôŇč ku adada nida, ¶i a-maŇč paajaw ¶inidaan amanan pi Ē~ °dis tu udip numisa ńßan, sakamu ńßan nida tu Ňčar~…ĺaj ¶inidaan, tur~…ĺu tu amińß ¶aan ku Ňčar~…ĺaj aku i tisuwan ńßan. naw samuńßmuńß sananaj ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° maka t…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu kamu nida mańßi ¶aaj kija ku namaka bar~…ĺu ¶uaj nida a namuńß, pab…ôr~…ĺi ńßannida ¶i a-maŇč tu ¶a ¶aja a bar~…ĺu nu u ¶iaan, saka paini tu kasasunamuńß. tat…ôŇčaaj tu ni a-maŇč a masasuŇčar~…ĺaj, mabawbaw ku bar~…ĺu ¶u ni ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° tu sakaudip nu tawjaaj, pabar~…ĺu ¶u satu ¶inida miar~…ĺ…ôs tu i pa-r~…ĺi ani pa ¶upijawan a sakaudip, tajda nuńß…ôni atu ¶i a-maŇč i inaka maudip. idaw kunipi kijakuna nuda tu kar~…ĺisiwan, wanik…ôn nida ¶i a-maŇč . tańß…ôkar~…ĺ sańß…ônaj ¶i a-maŇč mar~…ĺit…ômuńß nida ku naajawaj ni ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° a mamidaŇč, mapaaw ¶inida pabar~…ĺiw. mar~…ĺiŇč…ôs ¶inida sur~…ĺit satu tigamin sapab…ôr~…ĺi ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° an, sakamusa kaikaku mar~…ĺa katawaan nutau a mamidaŇč sa, r~…ĺijas satu ¶inida tu pa-r~…ĺi . suajaw satu ¶i a-maŇč ¶inidaan, ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° u kajdińßan numaku atu sakaudip, sisa, ¶aaj pir~…ĺijas ¶inida tu pa-r~…ĺi , patusud ¶inida tu kaŇčr~…ĺajan nida a tad…ômaw sur~…ĺur~…ĺ…ôn kaku sa, ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° paini ¶i a-maŇč nan sakamusa, " isuńßan uni ka anuiwiwan numaku amaudip u sakasiŇčar~…ĺińßan numaku kisu a tad…ômaw". pina tu a d…ômiadan, ina tatusaan itida i r~…ĺikr~…ĺik nu pa-r~…ĺi ami Ē~ °…ôsuj tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. katin…ôŇčan satu ni kun- ¶…ôa , putun ńßantu ku sapab…ôr~…ĺi ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° an tu sakaudip a kar~…ĺisiw. sudikud…ôn nida ku mamidaŇč nida pa ¶akaj tu nu udip a udu kim, saka ¶aw atu sakaudip nu sakaudip nuńß…ôni. ¶i a-maŇč matin…ôŇč satu, maŇčar~…ĺaj pa ¶akaj tunipab…ôr~…ĺi nu babar~…ĺaki ¶inidan tu zajsaŇč, mińßamin patadańß tu tadańß nu mamidaŇč nida. ¶i a-maŇč maar~…ĺaan nida ku ¶…ôn ¶i tad…ômaw patajida i pa-r~…ĺi misur~…ĺit tunipatajnian tu tigamim, ¶i a-maŇč r~…ĺijas…ôn ńßannida ku mamidaŇča nida. ja tigamin ar~…ĺaw nijama ni a-maŇč , sujwu Ē~ ° skakaaj ¶i du Ē~ ° *wa sins…ôn nisur~…ĺitan, pa ¶…ôba…ôn nida ¶i a-maŇč mir~…ĺijas, sisa mit…ôpanida ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° , sakumu ńßan nida "tatajnaan a wawa nu kaku, ¶i a-maŇč a ¶ar~…ĺ…ôkakaan nu tatajna atu siidaaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu kun ¶…ô amikunjaku, sisa jar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° makat…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu ¶i a-maŇč Ňčan atu ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° nu kankij sakamu sa: anu ¶i a-maŇč anu ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ôs kuni kar~…ĺ…ô ¶abajan tina pa ¶upijawaj, asipa ¶ub…ôr~…ĺis kunipi kunjaku sa. ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° maŇčut…ôbur~…ĺ mijukiw ¶i du Ē~ ° *wa sins…ôn : anu putun…ôn ńßan nunamu kuni kar~…ĺ…ô ¶aajan mińßida mipataja kumu i takuwan. ¶i du Ē~ ° *wa sins…ôn ¶aaj pisudaŇč, ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° mipir~…ĺi Ē~ ° ¶inida, sakamu ńßan nida ¶i du Ē~ ° *wa sins…ôn mińßaŇč tu kaku atu ¶i a-maŇč a ¶aajtu kar~…ĺ…ô ¶abaj kami ńßan. ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° mapataj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺum misur~…ĺit tu sapab…ôr~…ĺi tu sakaputun anikar~…ĺ…ô ¶abajan a tigamin, tar~…ĺuma Ē~ °satu i pa-r~…ĺi mutikua ¶a mar~…ĺa pa ¶upijawan ¶inida. midawis ¶inida tu Ňčar~…ĺaj ni wa…ô-wir~…ĺ…ô-na ¶…ôa , na ¶…ôa padaŇčan nida mibu…ôs tu ńßamin nu tadańß, mapatadańß satu patar~…ĺuma…ôn nida ku udu Ē~ ° kim atu saka ¶aw . maar~…ĺa ni a-maŇč ku tigamin mapataj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺum kir~…ĺur~…ĺ satu tu wama a tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i nijadu, nika ¶i a-maŇč jadańß kunidat…ôŇčan tu ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° an, ¶inida ¶aaj tu kawnu tad…ômawan tajnisa ¶a i pa-r~…ĺi . ¶inida maŇčar~…ĺaj mi Ē~ °dis pa ¶uaj tu mamidaŇč a "tunipib…ôr~…ĺińßan ¶inidaan " mat…ôpa nida ku bar~…ĺu nu u ¶ija a tatajna, misanai ¶inidaan, kajnańß…ôn nida tu naian nu wantan ńßan, naian nu bar~…ĺu ¶uan a pa ¶upijawan ńßan, u kasasunamuńß ńßan par~…ĺasiwbajan numis ńßan. ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° misuajaw tu mamidaŇča nu pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶, mar~…ĺar~…ĺum ¶inida pawan…ôn kaku ńßan, a ¶aaj tu kasasuadińß kita. ¶i a-maŇč maŇčar~…ĺaj atu ¶inida mir~…ĺijas tina pa-r~…ĺi an, mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw tajdan i ¶aaja kaw katin…ôŇčaj nutaw a kitidaan, tajda itida unika sasuŇčaajan nuńß…ôni. ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° namusakamu tu ¶inidaan, a ¶aaj ńßidai kina kawaw sa, ¶i a-maŇč pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ kuni simsiman satu ujnijan atu ¶i na ¶…ôa nu sakakapańß nuńß…ôni sa, mapataj nu r~…ĺiŇč…ôs ¶uduńß ńßan nida ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° , nu ¶a ¶aja a t…ôpik nu pida sipat…ôpi Ē~ ° ńßan i udip nida misanai ¶inidaan, r~…ĺijut satu ¶inida mir~…ĺijas. mapa ¶u ¶uk ku bar~…ĺu ¶u ni ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° , mabur~…ĺir~…ĺańß. utiińß satu ku udipudipan, im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ¶aaj tu r~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ. ¶i a-maŇč jadatu mir~…ĺijas tu fa-kuo . namakajiniaj a nasur~…ĺitan
S.FORM: balu nu ucya a tatayna (kamu nu Hulam: ŤĆ∂ŤäĪŚ•≥) kamu nu cudad a sasakamuen nu pakuyucay a inaka nu limucedan ci Ma-ke-li-te' tayni i Fa-kuo Pa-li malingatu tu pacupiyaw, tada bangcal tu cinida kanamuhan nu Pa-li siidaay a luma'an masasu namuh namin, mala sakanamuhan a pacupiyaway, pangangan han "balu nu ucya a tatayna", uipitupida' cinidaan kanca idaw ku kanamuhan nida tu cacaya a balud nu balu- u ucya a baluan. ci Ma-ke-li-te' si haykikac a imelangan, itida i kuncun padekuan malitemuh nida ku siidaay a limucedan, u udip nida atu taykaku mahida ci Ma-ke-li-te' , saka daysankic tu sisa caay ka tenes mapatay tu, siidaay nu limuceda a wama ci Muo-li A-lung kun-cea mabahal makaadih tu misengiay tu tataynaan a wawa numaku ci Ma-ke-li-te' , sa alahan cinida palawawa han. ci kun-cea mihang ci Ma-ke-li-te' an tu hamin nu sakaudip nida, anu males nida ku sapacupiyaw a kawaw. nika ci Ma-ke-li-te' ahican ahican nida kiya haw, ci kun-cea pangkiw kunipi wada nida tu sapabeli cinidaan tu sakaudip , ci Ma-ke-li-te' caay pakadungdung tunipiwada nida tu hatidaay a sakaudip, yadah tu ku tadah nida anu pina tu a mang nu Fa-lan . . idaw ku cacaya a labii nu kalaluwahan a demiad, biyaw nida ci Puo-li-dan-se idaw kunipi laday nida tu tusaay a masakapahay idaw ku cacay ci A-mang Tu-wa mapatay nungalay ci Ma-ke-li-te' an. mudeku ci Ma-ke-li-te' tu cacaya a mihcaan, ci A-mang sademiad sa tayni mididaw tu imelang nida, caay pahetik tu ngangan nida. ci Puo-li-dan-se pasayda musakamu ci Ma-ke-li-te' ci A-mang anga tu ngalay nida, talalusa' cinida malalum. idaw ku cacaya a demiad, namukan sa henay ci Ma-ke-li-te' alaw kasenu' sa pihaceng ku adada nida, ci A-mang paayaw cinidaan amanan pi'dis tu udip numisa han, sakamu han nida tu ngalay cinidaan, tulu tu amihcaan ku ngalay aku i tisuwan han. naw samuhmuh sananay ci Ma-ke-li-te' maka tengil tu kamu nida mahicaay kiya ku namaka balucuay nida a namuh, pabeli hannida ci A-mang tu cacaya a balu nu uciaan, saka paini tu kasasunamuh. tatengaay tu ni A-mang a masasungalay, mabawbaw ku balucu ni Ma-ke-li-te' tu sakaudip nu tawyaay, pabalucu satu cinida miales tu i Pa-li ani pacupiyawan a sakaudip, tayda nuheni atu ci A-mang i inaka maudip. idaw kunipi kiyakuna nuda tu kalisiwan, waniken nida ci A-mang . tahekal sahenay ci A-mang malitemuh nida ku naayaway ni Ma-ke-li-te' a mamidang, mapaaw cinida pabaliw. malinges cinida sulit satu tigamin sapabeli ci Ma-ke-li-te' an, sakamusa kaikaku mala katawaan nutau a mamidang sa, liyas satu cinida tu Pa-li . suayaw satu ci A-mang cinidaan, ci Ma-ke-li-te' u kaydihan numaku atu sakaudip, sisa, caay piliyas cinida tu Pa-li , patusud cinida tu kanglayan nida a tademaw sululen kaku sa, ci Ma-ke-li-te' paini ci A-mang nan sakamusa, " isuhan uni ka anuiwiwan numaku amaudip u sakasingalihan numaku kisu a tademaw". pina tu a demiadan, ina tatusaan itida i liklik nu Pa-li ami'esuy tu luma'. katinengan satu ni kun-cea , putun hantu ku sapabeli ci Ma-ke-li-te' an tu sakaudip a kalisiw. sudikuden nida ku mamidang nida pacakay tu nu udip a udu kim, sakacaw atu sakaudip nu sakaudip nuheni. ci A-mang matineng satu, mangalay pacakay tunipabeli nu babalaki cinidan tu zaysang, mihamin patadah tu tadah nu mamidang nida. ci A-mang maalaan nida ku cenci tademaw patayida i Pa-li misulit tunipataynian tu tigamim, ci A-mang liyasen hannida ku mamidanga nida. ya tigamin alaw niyama ni A-mang , Suywu' skakaay ci Du' ‚Äďwa sinsen nisulitan, pacebaen nida ci A-mang miliyas, sisa mitepanida ci Ma-ke-li-te' , sakumu han nida "tataynaan a wawa nu kaku, ci A-mang a calekakaan nu tatayna atu siidaay a luma' nu kunce amikunyaku, sisa yaluma' makatengil tu ci A-mang ngan atu ci Ma-ke-li-te' nu kankiy sakamu sa: anu ci A-mang anu caay kales kuni kalecabayan tina pacupiyaway, asipacubelis kunipi kunyaku sa. ci Ma-ke-li-te' mangutebul miyukiw ci Du' ‚Äďwa sinsen : anu putunen han nunamu kuni kalecaayan mihida mipataya kumu i takuwan. ci Du' ‚Äďwa sinsen caay pisudang, ci Ma-ke-li-te' mipili' cinida, sakamu han nida ci Du' ‚Äďwa sinsen mihang tu kaku atu ci A-mang acaaytu kalecabay kami han. ci Ma-ke-li-te' mapatay nu lalum misulit tu sapabeli tu sakaputun anikalecabayan a tigamin, taluma'satu i Pa-li mutikuaca mala pacupiyawan cinida. midawis cinida tu ngalay ni Wae-wile-nacea , Nacea padangan nida mibues tu hamin nu tadah, mapatadah satu patalumaen nida ku udu' kim atu sakacaw . maala ni A-mang ku tigamin mapatay nu lalum kilul satu tu wama a taluma' i niyadu, nika ci A-mang yadah kunidatengan tuci Ma-ke-li-te' an, cinida caay tu kawnu tademawan taynisaca i Pa-li . cinida mangalay mi'dis pacuay tu mamidang a "tunipibelihan cinidaan " matepa nida ku balu nu uciya a tatayna, misanai cinidaan, kaynahen nida tu naian nu wantan han, naian nu balucuan a pacupiyawan han, u kasasunamuh han palasiwbayan numis han. ci Ma-ke-li-te' misuayaw tu mamidanga nu patelac, malalum cinida pawanen kaku han, acaay tu kasasuadih kita. ci A-mang mangalay atu cinida miliyas tina Pa-li an, milaliw taydan i caaya kaw katinengay nutaw a kitidaan, tayda itida unika sasungaayan nuheni. ci Ma-ke-li-te' namusakamu tu cinidaan, acaay hidai kina kawaw sa, ci A-mang patelac kuni simsiman satu uyniyan atu ci Nacea nu sakakapah nuheni sa, mapatay nu linges cuduh han nida ci Ma-ke-li-te' , nu cacaya a tepik nu pida sipatepi' han i udip nida misanai cinidaan, liyut satu cinida miliyas. mapacucuk ku balucu ni Ma-ke-li-te' , mabulilah. utiih satu ku udipudipan, imelang caay tu lekal. ci A-mang yadatu miliyas tu Fa-kuo . namakayiniay a nasulitan
S.PHON: bar~…ĺu nu u ¶ja a tatajna (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ***) kamu nu ¶udad a sasakamu…ôn nu pakuju ¶aj a inaka nu r~…ĺimu ¶…ôdan ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° tajni i fa-kuo pa-r~…ĺi mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu pa ¶upijaw, tada baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ tu ¶inida kanamuńßan nu pa-r~…ĺi siidaaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an masasu namuńß namin, mar~…ĺa sakanamuńßan a pa ¶upijawaj, paŇčaŇčan ńßan "bar~…ĺu nu u ¶ja a tatajna", uipitupida Ē~ ° ¶inidaan kan ¶a idaw ku kanamuńßan nida tu ¶a ¶aja a bar~…ĺud nu bar~…ĺu- u u ¶ja a bar~…ĺuan. ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° si ńßajkika ¶ a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan, itida i kun ¶un pad…ôkuan mar~…ĺit…ômuńß nida ku siidaaj a r~…ĺimu ¶…ôdan, u udip nida atu tajkaku mańßida ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° , saka dajsanki ¶ tu sisa ¶aaj ka t…ôn…ôs mapataj tu, siidaaj nu r~…ĺimu ¶…ôda a wama ¶i muo-r~…ĺi a-r~…ĺuŇč kun- ¶…ôa mabańßar~…ĺ makaadińß tu mis…ôŇčiaj tu tatajnaan a wawa numaku ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° , sa ar~…ĺańßan ¶inida par~…ĺawawa ńßan. ¶i kun- ¶…ôa mińßaŇč ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° an tu ńßamin nu sakaudip nida, anu mar~…ĺ…ôs nida ku sapa ¶upijaw a kawaw. nika ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° ańßi ¶an ańßi ¶an nida kija ńßaw, ¶i kun- ¶…ôa paŇčkiw kunipi wada nida tu sapab…ôr~…ĺi ¶inidaan tu sakaudip , ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° ¶aaj pakaduŇčduŇč tunipiwada nida tu ńßatidaaj a sakaudip, jadańß tu ku tadańß nida anu pina tu a maŇč nu fa-r~…ĺan . . idaw ku ¶a ¶aja a r~…ĺabii nu kar~…ĺar~…ĺuwańßan a d…ômiad, bijaw nida ¶i puo-r~…ĺi-dan-s…ô idaw kunipi r~…ĺadaj nida tu tusaaj a masakapańßaj idaw ku ¶a ¶aj ¶i a-maŇč tu-wa mapataj nuŇčar~…ĺaj ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° an. mud…ôku ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° tu ¶a ¶aja a mińß ¶aan, ¶i a-maŇč sad…ômiad sa tajni mididaw tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč nida, ¶aaj pańß…ôtik tu ŇčaŇčan nida. ¶i puo-r~…ĺi-dan-s…ô pasajda musakamu ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° ¶i a-maŇč aŇča tu Ňčar~…ĺaj nida, tar~…ĺar~…ĺusa Ē~ ° ¶inida mar~…ĺar~…ĺum. idaw ku ¶a ¶aja a d…ômiad, namukan sa ńß…ônaj ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° ar~…ĺaw kas…ônu Ē~ ° sa pińßa ¶…ôŇč ku adada nida, ¶i a-maŇč paajaw ¶inidaan amanan pi Ē~ °dis tu udip numisa ńßan, sakamu ńßan nida tu Ňčar~…ĺaj ¶inidaan, tur~…ĺu tu amińß ¶aan ku Ňčar~…ĺaj aku i tisuwan ńßan. naw samuńßmuńß sananaj ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° maka t…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu kamu nida mańßi ¶aaj kija ku namaka bar~…ĺu ¶uaj nida a namuńß, pab…ôr~…ĺi ńßannida ¶i a-maŇč tu ¶a ¶aja a bar~…ĺu nu u ¶iaan, saka paini tu kasasunamuńß. tat…ôŇčaaj tu ni a-maŇč a masasuŇčar~…ĺaj, mabawbaw ku bar~…ĺu ¶u ni ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° tu sakaudip nu tawjaaj, pabar~…ĺu ¶u satu ¶inida miar~…ĺ…ôs tu i pa-r~…ĺi ani pa ¶upijawan a sakaudip, tajda nuńß…ôni atu ¶i a-maŇč i inaka maudip. idaw kunipi kijakuna nuda tu kar~…ĺisiwan, wanik…ôn nida ¶i a-maŇč . tańß…ôkar~…ĺ sańß…ônaj ¶i a-maŇč mar~…ĺit…ômuńß nida ku naajawaj ni ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° a mamidaŇč, mapaaw ¶inida pabar~…ĺiw. mar~…ĺiŇč…ôs ¶inida sur~…ĺit satu tigamin sapab…ôr~…ĺi ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° an, sakamusa kaikaku mar~…ĺa katawaan nutau a mamidaŇč sa, r~…ĺijas satu ¶inida tu pa-r~…ĺi . suajaw satu ¶i a-maŇč ¶inidaan, ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° u kajdińßan numaku atu sakaudip, sisa, ¶aaj pir~…ĺijas ¶inida tu pa-r~…ĺi , patusud ¶inida tu kaŇčr~…ĺajan nida a tad…ômaw sur~…ĺur~…ĺ…ôn kaku sa, ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° paini ¶i a-maŇč nan sakamusa, " isuńßan uni ka anuiwiwan numaku amaudip u sakasiŇčar~…ĺińßan numaku kisu a tad…ômaw". pina tu a d…ômiadan, ina tatusaan itida i r~…ĺikr~…ĺik nu pa-r~…ĺi ami Ē~ °…ôsuj tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. katin…ôŇčan satu ni kun- ¶…ôa , putun ńßantu ku sapab…ôr~…ĺi ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° an tu sakaudip a kar~…ĺisiw. sudikud…ôn nida ku mamidaŇč nida pa ¶akaj tu nu udip a udu kim, saka ¶aw atu sakaudip nu sakaudip nuńß…ôni. ¶i a-maŇč matin…ôŇč satu, maŇčar~…ĺaj pa ¶akaj tunipab…ôr~…ĺi nu babar~…ĺaki ¶inidan tu zajsaŇč, mińßamin patadańß tu tadańß nu mamidaŇč nida. ¶i a-maŇč maar~…ĺaan nida ku ¶…ôn ¶i tad…ômaw patajida i pa-r~…ĺi misur~…ĺit tunipatajnian tu tigamim, ¶i a-maŇč r~…ĺijas…ôn ńßannida ku mamidaŇča nida. ja tigamin ar~…ĺaw nijama ni a-maŇč , sujwu Ē~ ° skakaaj ¶i du Ē~ ° *wa sins…ôn nisur~…ĺitan, pa ¶…ôba…ôn nida ¶i a-maŇč mir~…ĺijas, sisa mit…ôpanida ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° , sakumu ńßan nida "tatajnaan a wawa nu kaku, ¶i a-maŇč a ¶ar~…ĺ…ôkakaan nu tatajna atu siidaaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu kun ¶…ô amikunjaku, sisa jar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° makat…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu ¶i a-maŇč Ňčan atu ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° nu kankij sakamu sa: anu ¶i a-maŇč anu ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ôs kuni kar~…ĺ…ô ¶abajan tina pa ¶upijawaj, asipa ¶ub…ôr~…ĺis kunipi kunjaku sa. ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° maŇčut…ôbur~…ĺ mijukiw ¶i du Ē~ ° *wa sins…ôn : anu putun…ôn ńßan nunamu kuni ¶a mar~…ĺa pa ¶upijawan ¶inida. midawis ¶inida tu Ňčar~…ĺaj ni wa…ô-wir~…ĺ…ô-na ¶…ôa , na ¶…ôa padaŇčan nida mibu…ôs tu ńßamin nu tadańß, mapatadańß satu patar~…ĺuma…ôn nida ku udu Ē~ ° kim atu saka ¶aw . maar~…ĺa ni a-maŇč ku tigamin mapataj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺum kir~…ĺur~…ĺ satu tu wama a tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i nijadu, nika ¶i a-maŇč jadańß kunidat…ôŇčan tu ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° an, ¶inida ¶aaj tu kawnu tad…ômawan tajnisa ¶a i pa-r~…ĺi . ¶inida maŇčar~…ĺaj mi Ē~ °dis pa ¶uaj tu mamidaŇč a "tunipib…ôr~…ĺińßan ¶inidaan " mat…ôpa nida ku bar~…ĺu nu u ¶ija a tatajna, misanai ¶inidaan, kajnańß…ôn nida tu sasuŇčaajan nuńß…ôni. ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° namusakamu tu ¶inidaan, a ¶aaj ńßidai kina kawaw sa, ¶i a-maŇč pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ kuni simsiman satu ujnijan atu ¶i na ¶…ôa nu sakakapańß nuńß…ôni sa, mapataj nu r~…ĺiŇč…ôs ¶uduńß ńßan nida ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° , nu ¶a ¶aja a t…ôpik nu pida sipat…ôpi Ē~ ° ńßan i udip nida misanai ¶inidaan, r~…ĺijut satu ¶inida mir~…ĺijas. mapa ¶u ¶uk ku bar~…ĺu ¶u ni ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ ° , mabur~…ĺir~…ĺańß. utiińß satu ku udipudipan, im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ¶aaj tu r~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ. ¶i a-maŇč jadatu mir~…ĺijas tu fa-kuo . namakajiniaj a nasur~…ĺitan
